content: RAPIDS RMM design: stream-ordered allocation extends CUDA stream model to alloc/free. Two patterns: cuda_async_memory_resource (cudaMallocAsync/FreeAsync, CUDA 11.2+ driver pool, best perf/defrag) and pool_memory_resource (coalescing best-fit suballocator over a big upstream chunk). Rust equivalent: cudarc stream-ordered alloc or wrap cudaMallocAsync; a fit-scoped arena over a pre-allocated pool avoids per-node malloc churn.
